markets.question: Sheffield United FC vs. Swansea City AFC: O/U 4.5
markets.description:
In the upcoming EFL Championship game between Sheffield United FC and Swansea City AFC, scheduled for April 3 at 10:00 AM ET:

This market will resolve to "Over" if Sheffield United FC and Swansea City AFC combine to score 5 or more goals in this game.

If the combined total is less than 5, this market will resolve to "Under".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

If the game is started but not completed, this market will resolve according to the official final score published on efl.com. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

events.title: Sheffield United FC vs. Swansea City AFC - More Markets
events.description: More markets for the EFL Championship game, scheduled for April 3 at 10:00 AM ET.

markets.question: Sheffield United FC vs. Swansea City AFC: Both Teams to Score
markets.description:
In the upcoming EFL Championship game between Sheffield United FC and Swansea City AFC, scheduled for April 3 at 10:00 AM ET:

This market will resolve to "Yes" if both Sheffield United FC and Swansea City AFC each score at least one goal during the game.

This market will resolve to "No" if either team fails to score (i.e., if one or both teams finish with zero goals).

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

If the game is started but not completed, this market will resolve according to the official final score published on efl.com. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

markets.question: Honor of Kings: Talent Gaming vs Qing Jiu Club (BO5) - King Pro League Stage 3 Group A
markets.description:
This market refers to the Honor of Kings match between Talent Gaming and Qing Jiu Club in the King Pro League Stage 3 Group A, initially scheduled for March 13 at 5:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to "Talent Gaming" if Talent Gaming win the match against Qing Jiu Club.

This market will resolve to "Qing Jiu Club" if Qing Jiu Club win the match against Talent Gaming.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://liquipedia.net/honorofkings/Main_Page. However, if https://liquipedia.net/honorofkings/Main_Page has not published final results within 2 hours after the event’s conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.

markets.question: Honor of Kings: Hero JiuJing vs LGD NBW (BO5) - King Pro League Stage 3 Group A
markets.description:
This market refers to the Honor of Kings match between Hero JiuJing and LGD NBW in the King Pro League Stage 3 Group A, initially scheduled for March 13 at 8:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to "Hero JiuJing" if Hero JiuJing win the match against LGD NBW.

This market will resolve to "LGD NBW" if LGD NBW win the match against Hero JiuJing.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://liquipedia.net/honorofkings/Main_Page.
